theory.canonical_statement: ID4659 records Formulavariable Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `JavaParserData\TokenizerGrammarRules\SpellingsZH\0.txt` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $600 per day" FormulaVariable -> "广" "告" "显" "示" "1000" "次" "的" "费" "用" E<<< FormulaVariable[{FVariable["CostPerThousandImpressions_n:CPM"], {"WebAdvertisingRevenueFormula", "CPM_int"}}] >>> // English: "cpm" // Chinese: "廣告顯示1000次的費用" // ex. "每天198000次点击,每天600美元,广告显示1000次的费用" -> "cpm 198000 hits per day $
